"Die Arbeiter von Wien" (The Workers of Vienna) is a famous Austrian workers' song that was written during the July Revolt of 1927 in Austria. The text of the workers' song comes from Fritz Die Arbeiter von Wien Die Arbeiter von Wien Wir sind das Bauvolk der kommenden Welt, wir sind der Sähmann, die Saat und das Feld, wir sind die Schnitter der kommenden Mahd, wir sind die Zukunft und wir sind die Tat. So flieg du flammende, du rote Fahne, voran dem Wege den wir ziehn, wir sind der Zukunft getreue Kämpfer, wir sind die Arbeiter English : The song "Arbeiter Von Wien" was made in 1927, when during the so-called July revolt in Vienna 89 demonstrators were killed by shots in the crowd. Their struggle was bloodily suppressed, but the song Die Arbeiter von Wien found its way into the international anti-fascist song repertoire. #workers #internationale #arbeiter #unityday Die Arbeiter von Wien Lyrics: So flieg, du flammende, du rote Fahne / Voran dem Wege, den wir zieh'n / Wir sind der Zukunft getreue Kämpfer / Wir sind die Arbeiter von Wien / Wir sind das Bauvolk Listen to the song Die Arbeiter von Wien or Buy it on amazon The industrial folk song "Die Arbeiter von Wien" (English: The Workers of Vienna) was written in 1927 during the July Revolt in Vienna, when 89 demonstrators were shot. "Workers of Vienna" is an Austrian workers' song written by Fritz Brügel. It uses the tune of "White Army, Black Baron" (A Bolsheviks' Russian marching song), composed by Samuel Pokrass. It became popular during the civil war, and its popularity has since grown, attracting many anti-fascist movements and people around the world. After finding popularity during the Austrian civil war, "Die Arbeiter von Wien" has become a famous anti-fascist song known all around the worldMy channel is Hearts of Iron 4 mod Red Flood Theme Arbeiter von Wien Die Arbeiter von Wien " Die Arbeiter von Wien " ("The Workers of Vienna") is a song, which probably was written in 1927 when 89 protesters were killed during the July Revolt by police forces which were firing into the outraged crowd. The text of this Arbeiterlied was written by the Viennese poet and essayist Fritz Brügel (1897–1955). The song The Workers of Vienna was probably made in 1927, when during the so-called Julirevolte in Vienna 89 demonstrators were killed by shots in the crowd. The text is by Fritz Brügel (1897-1955), a Viennese poet and essayist. Wir sind der Zukunft getreue Kämpfer, wir sind die Arbeiter von Wien. Wie auch die Lüge uns schmähend umkreist, alles besiegend erhebt sich der Geist. Submitter's comments: Das Lied "Die Arbeiter von Wien" entstand vermutlich 1927, als während der so genannten Julirevolte in Wien 89 Demonstranten durch Schüsse in die Menge getötet wurden. Der Text stammt von Fritz Brügel (1897–1955), einem Wiener Lyriker und Essayisten. " The Red Army Is the Strongest ", [a] popularly known by its incipit " White Army, Black Baron ", [b] is a Soviet march song written by Pavel Gorinshtein [ru] and composed by Samuel Pokrass. Written in 1920, during the Russian Civil War, the song was meant as a combat anthem for the Red Army. Der Text des Arbeiterliedes stammt von Fritz Brügel (1897–1955), einem Wiener Lyriker und Essayisten.
